question: Introduction
answer:
Love is a very mystery concept in human’s world. Love can exist in everywhere, and love has more than one form. Love can be romantic, supportive, caring, inclusive, and so on. In the article, “Love Is Medicine for Fear,” Arthur C. Brooks claims that love can reduces fear and anxiety from both mental and physical. In the article, “Why does love feel magical? It’s an evolutionary advantage,” Benjamin Kaveladze, Jonathan Schooler, and Oliver Sng claims that love is a psychological mechanism formed through the process of evolution. It helps establish long-term and stable relationships, which in turn facilitates the transmission of genes.
In this exhibition, I will show my discovery of love in school University of California, Santa Barbara(UCSB), and the connection between it and the articles written by......
